articles.title: Taskin, Mehidy, Taijul, Mahmudul put Bangladesh well in front
articles.description: Taijul Islam and Nahid Ranatook three wickets each after Taskin and Mehidy shared the first four to restrict Pakistan to 232

articles.title: Brooke Halliday steers New Zealand to series-levelling win in wet
articles.description: Lauren Bell rocks top order but England see game slip away in rain-reduced contest

articles.title: Pakistan name Iram Javed in T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: They will first travel to Ireland, where they play a tri-series that also includes West Indies

articles.title: Pakistan lose eight WTC points for slow over rate in first Test against Bangladesh
articles.description: Pakistan were eight overs short of the target and are now placed eighth on the WTC table with 11.11% points

articles.title: ICC suspends funding to Cricket Canada over governance-related issues
articles.description: ESPNcricinfo understands the funding suspension will not impact any cricket activities, including high performance programmes

articles.title: Fatima Sana smashes fastest fifty in women's T20Is
articles.description: Her 15-ball effort broke the record previous held by Sophie Devine, Phoebe Litchfield and Richa Ghosh, off 18 balls

articles.title: 'They don't need my service any longer' - Mushfiqur Rahim rules out ODI comeback
articles.description: He confirmed that he was asked to come back after announcing his retirement from the format last year following the team's early exit from the Champions Trophy

articles.title: Saudi Arabia set to launch Dunes League T20 in October
articles.description: It will be Saudi Arabia's first franchise league, and is expected to feature retired 'legends' who are still active in the franchise circuit

articles.title: Andrew Flintoff set to be named new Sydney Thunder BBL coach
articles.description: Former England allrounder is set for his first franchise coaching role overseas after two seasons in the Hundred with Northern Superchargers outside of his current England Lions role

articles.title: Suryakumar Yadav's place in India's T20I under scrutiny, BCCI to discuss succession plan
articles.description: Representing the Mumbai Indians, the 35-year-old has scored 195 runs from 11 matches at a strike-rate of 144.44, whilst averaging less than 18.
